context: This scenario checks that the agent can answer from searchable library content rather than metadata clues in file names.

checklist.name: correct book identified
checklist.description: Reports the exact title 'The Problems of Philosophy', author 'Bertrand Russell', and book_id 4 from the library.

checklist.name: content-derived discovery
checklist.description: Uses content or metadata lookup against library data (not filename inference) and identifies the book based on the sense-data/G.E. Moore clue.

checklist.name: evidence snippet
checklist.description: Includes a short quote/snippet from the library lookup showing both relevance to the provided clue and source of truth.

checklist.name: process explanation
checklist.description: Briefly explains the lookup sequence used (query + validation) and stays consistent with the returned evidence.
